blended.narrative: Boyne Highlands is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.3 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,885 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
